series_metadata.series_description: Documents review process to identify conflicts of interest between entities within the Ohio Attorney General's Office and the ethical screens implemented between persons or sections of the office in the spirit of the Ohio Rules of Professional Conduct. Records include, but are not limited to, ethics screen memo stipulating terms of the screen, correspondence, and tracking information.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: from end of case, end of conflict, or screen confirmed no longer needed. ; Paper: from end of case, end of conflict, or screen confirmed no longer needed, unless scanned and save electronically
